name: webster-pack-pro-v2
description: Professional Webster/Sachet pack management app. Persistent upload/save workflow, GP letter excludes OK medicines, and Special Orders/S8 module.

scripts.test: node scripts/smoke-test.js && node --test tests/gmail.test.js tests/mypak.test.js tests/mps.test.js
